calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

DEFENDANT JEANNIE SOOHOO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- sustain without leave to amend; no timely opposition filed (Opposition was filed on August 22nd, only five days before the hearing when nine court days are required.) Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
